creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #9)

Only devel/py-pyinstaller-hooks-contrib was built on Christopher's labour, so yes please, a 1000 attributions directed at Christopher for that. This Port, this bug report, was developed in isolation, and ignorance of Christopher's work on devel/py-pyinstaller.

Summary:
devel/py-pyinstaller: without Christopher
devel/py-pyinstaller-hooks-contrib: with Christopher's work.
